title: The Planner and the Geek Podcast
content: Maria Bruno and I host a monthly podcast called 'The Planner and the Geek.' [chuckle] I'm the geek, obviously. Maria is our Head of Wealth Planning Research - a CFP who actually knows how this stuff applies to real life. We've done over 20 episodes now. 529 plans, tax-efficient investing, retirement spending strategies - we cover it all. The fun part is our dynamic. I'll go deep into the research, and Maria will say 'Joel, in English please.' [laughs] It keeps me honest.
follow_up: We even had Tim Buckley on once - our CEO. Maria was cool as a cucumber. I was the one who was nervous. [chuckle] He's the CEO! But he was great. Down to earth. Just talked about what investors actually need. That's Vanguard culture.
